title: bromus occidentalis
intro: Bromus occidentalis, also known as western bromegrass, is a perennial grass species native to the western regions of North America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Bromus occidentalis include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and support respiratory health. Herbal preparations of Bromus occidentalis can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to alleviate various health concerns.
